test.query: SELECT * FROM bigint WHERE NOT ignore(toString(u128)) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT * FROM bigint WHERE NOT ignore(toString(i128)) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT * FROM bigint WHERE NOT ignore(toString(u256)) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT * FROM bigint WHERE NOT ignore(toString(i256)) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(10000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt128(number))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(5000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt128(number) + toUInt128('18446744073709551616'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(3000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt128(number) + toUInt128('170141183460469231731687303715884105727'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(10000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt256(number))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(5000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt256(number) + toUInt256('18446744073709551616'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(3000000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt256(number) + toUInt256('170141183460469231731687303715884105727'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(200000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt256(number) + toUInt256('340282366920938463463374607431768211456'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM numbers(50000) WHERE NOT ignore(toString(toUInt256(number) + toUInt256('57896044618658097711785492504343953926634992332820282019728792003956564819967'))) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
